zh.lifeSummary: 當Denise de FOUGERES於1030年5月4日出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑福雷-素-比艾福時，她的父親Auffroy de FOUGERES31歲，母親Chaana de SAUMUR26歲。她於1054年6月13日與Sulpice I d'AMBOISE在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1096年5月4日在法國崔英德-吉洛易安波享年66歲，埋葬在法國崔洛易-吉黑朋特列沃。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Denise de FOUGERES于1030年5月4日出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑福雷-素-比艾福时，她的父亲Auffroy de FOUGERES31岁，母亲Chaana de SAUMUR26岁。她于1054年6月13日与Sulpice I d'AMBOISE在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1096年5月4日在法国崔英德-吉洛易安波享年66岁，埋葬在法国崔洛易-吉黑朋特列沃。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: FOUGERES
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Denise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

variants.name: Denyse
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

en.lifeSummary: When Denise de FOUGERES was born on 4 May 1030, in Fougères-sur-Bièvre, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Auffroy de FOUGERES, was 31 and her mother, Chaana de SAUMUR, was 26. She married Sulpice I d'AMBOISE on 13 June 1054, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 4 May 1096, in Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 66, and was buried in Pontlevoy, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Denise de FOUGERES est née le 4 mai 1030, à Fougères-sur-Bièvre, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Auffroy de FOUGERES, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Chaana de SAUMUR, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sulpice I d'AMBOISE le 13 juin 1054, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1096, à Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Pontlevoy, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

de.Saumur,49328,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Denise de FOUGERES am 4. Mai 1030 in Fougères-sur-Bièvre, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Auffroy de FOUGERES 31 und ihre Mutter Chaana de SAUMUR 26. Sie hat am 13. Juni 1054 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich Sulpice I d'AMBOISE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1096 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich und wurde in Pontlevoy, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Sulpice I d'AMBOISE il 13 giugno 1054, nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 4 maggio 1096, nel Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Pontlevoy, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Denise de FOUGERESが1030年5月4日にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーフォウグeレス-スル-ビevアで生まれた時，父Auffroy de FOUGERESは31歳，母Chaana de SAUMURは26歳であった。1054年6月13日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスでSulpice I d'AMBOISEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1096年5月4日にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアーアンボイゼで66歳で死去し，フランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーポントレボイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Denise de FOUGERES(이)가 1030년 5월 4일 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 포우그e레스-수-비e브르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Auffroy de FOUGERES(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Chaana de SAUMUR(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1054년 6월 13일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 Sulpice I d'AMBOISE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1096년 5월 4일 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 아보이스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 폰틀레보이에 묻혔다.

pt.Saumur,49328,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Denise de FOUGERES nasceu em 4 de maio de 1030, em Fougères-sur-Bièvre, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Auffroy de FOUGERES, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Chaana de SAUMUR, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sulpice I d'AMBOISE em 13 de junho de 1054, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1096, em Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Pontlevoy, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França.

ru.Saumur,49328,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: саумур, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Denise de FOUGERES родилась 4 мая 1030 г. в местности фоугeрес-сур-биeвр, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Auffroy de FOUGERES было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Chaana de SAUMUR, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sulpice I d'AMBOISE 13 июня 1054 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 4 мая 1096 г. в местности эмбоис, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности понтлевои, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция.

Se casó con Sulpice I d'AMBOISE el 13 de junio de 1054, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1096, en Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Pontlevoy, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia.
